pi_items.source: setup_task.sh copies from /opt/freecad_samples/ to target path; setup_freecad.sh confirms setup
export_result.sh checks for this file at specified path
export_result.sh checks for this file at specified path
Task description explicitly states 'Apply a 2mm chamfer'; verifier.py expects value close to 2.0 with tolerance of 0.1
Examined Document.xml in contact_blocks.FCStd; confirmed TopBox exists as Part::Box object with id 948
Task description states 'ALL 12 edges of the TopBox shape'; a rectangular box (Part::Box) has exactly 12 edges by definition

privileged_info_summary: The input file contact_blocks.FCStd is real FEM geometry from FreeCAD's test suite, containing TopBox (Part::Box) and BottomBox objects. TopBox has 12 edges requiring a 2mm chamfer operation. The task requires saving the modified document to chamfered_blocks.FCStd and exporting the chamfered TopBox to STEP format at chamfered_topbox.step. All file paths are correctly specified. The chamfer size of 2.0mm is explicitly stated in both the task description and metadata.
